# frontend-ops-expert

> Frontend Ops specialist perspective for the weekly review. Focuses on CI/CD, Scheduler, KPI ratchet, release process, Renovate / Dependabot health.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/frontend/review-perspectives/frontend-ops-expert
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/frontend/review-perspectives/frontend-ops-expert
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
